ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Pending Appraisal"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "In Appraisal"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Recommended for Approval"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Approved") ), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.KYC_Status__c, "Active")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Customer must be KYC Active before the loan application can proceed.
